title: AN ACT relating to roofing contractors.
subject: Administrative Regulations and Proceedings
Corrections Impact
Fees
Housing, Building, and Construction
Licensing
Occupations and Professions

abstracts.abstract: Create new sections of KRS Chapter 198B to define terms; establish licensing for roofing contractors under the Department of Housing, Buildings and Construction; prohibit any persons not licensed under the department from holding himself or herself out as a roofing contractor; allow the department to issue roofing contractor licenses, promulgate administrative regulations, and implement disciplinary actions; establish applicant requirements and fee limitations; establish a fine and potential misdemeanor incarceration for violations; create the roofing contractors fund; amend KRS 367.620 to conform.
